name: Robotics Control MCP
description: IoT and robotics interface: list devices, send serial/HTTP commands, read sensors, control servos, send G-code, and emergency stop. Part of MEOK AI Labs' HARVI project.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List all available devices. Auto-discovers serial ports (USB, Arduino,

tools.name: send_command
tools.description: Send a text command to a device and get its response.

tools.name: read_sensor
tools.description: Read a sensor value from a connected device. Sends a READ command

tools.name: set_servo
tools.description: Set a servo motor to a specific angle.

tools.name: run_gcode
tools.description: Send G-code commands to a CNC machine, 3D printer, or robot arm.

tools.name: emergency_stop
tools.description: Activate or release emergency stop. When active, ALL commands to ALL
